author: Election Desk
title: Bhandup West (Maharashtra) Assembly Election Results 2024 Live: Winner, Runner-up, Candidates List
text: Bhandup West (Maharashtra) Assembly Election Results 2024 Live: The Bhandup West Assembly constituency went to polls on November 20, 2024. The candidates contesting the 2024 assembly elections from Shirpur are as follows - RAMESH GAJANAN KORGAONKAR of Shiv Sena (Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray) , ASHOK DHARMARAJ PATIL of Shiv Sena , SHIRISH GUNWANT SAWANT of Maharashtra Navnirman sena and others. In the last Assembly elections, Ramesh Gajanan Korgaonkar of SHS won by a margin of 29173 votes. Sandeep Prabhakar Jalgaonkar of MNS was the runner up securing 42782 votes.In the 2019 Maharashtra Legislative Assembly election, the state had recorded a 61.4% voter turnout, giving a win to NDA. The NDA consisted of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and the Shiv Sena. Together they formed a coalition as they fell short of a clear majority to form the government independently.
